notes: This file records source feasibility for non-Big-5 league player data. It does not merge numeric rows into playerPerformance.json yet.
No invented stats are included. Sample leaderboard rows are parsed from public ESPN HTML pages where available.
FootyStats row counts are dataset-page metadata; current CSV/API access needs Premium/API key before full import.
FBref pages exist, but direct local fetch returned Cloudflare challenge pages in this environment.

target_leagues.recommended_next_action: Build an ESPN leaderboard importer for names and ESPN IDs, then use ESPN match summaries or Excel4Soccer/FootyStats API for minutes and starts.

summary.direct_import_recommendation: Start with ESPN public leaderboards for Portugal, Belgium, Greece, MLS, Brazil, and Argentina; use FootyStats as the broad API/CSV path for all seven including Poland; use Excel4Soccer as a workbook/ESPN-derived validation path for Portugal and Belgium; keep FBref as a manual/browser or future soccerdata path because local fetch is blocked.
